title: E-mail
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:XWAlliance_e-mail.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Ace Azzameen's e-mail]]
{{Quote|Check your mail.|[[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]]|<ref name="XWA">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''E-mail''' was a method of transmitting and receiving digital messages using electronic devices over a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] network. 

==Notable e-mail users==
The Commandant of the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] used e-mails to communicate with cadets. [[Kyle Katarn]] received an e-mail stating [[Morgan Katarn|his father]] was killed in a Rebel raid.<ref name="SFTE">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>

On board the ''[[Star of Empire]]'', [[Nathan Donar III]] sent a warning message to Katarn to stay away from [[Jan Ors]], making him realize that [[Dol Donar II|his father]] knew about their Rebel operations.<ref name="SFTE" />

On board the ''[[New Hope]]'', before leaving for the [[Mission to Danuta]], [[Jan Ors]] left an e-mail to Katarn, wishing him luck as she had to leave for a new mission and couldn't see him off; Katarn didn't know that Ors's new mission was actually spying on him.<ref name="SFTE" />

[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] frequently used it to keep in touch with certain companies, such as the [[Alliance Recruiting Center]], his compatriots, friends, and [[Azzameen family|family members]].<ref name="XWA" />

{{Tech-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' Nathan Donar sends an anonymous e-mail to Katarn about Ors that reaches him in his cabin. However, in the [[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|audio drama]] it appears as an eponymous voice call.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
